title: tricyrtis dilatata var. chinensis
intro: Tricyrtis dilatata var. chinensis, also known as the toad lily, is a type of flowering plant in the family Colchicaceae. The toad lily plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, toad lily is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs to create remedies for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
